occurrence_sentence: QuantFi Selected for Prestigious French Accelerator Program
QuantFi, a leader in creating quantum computer algorithms for the financial services industry, has joined the Village at CA, the start-up accelerator of the Crédit Agricole Group.

[QuantFi](https://quantumzeitgeist.com/quantum-finance-company-of-the-day-quantfi/), a leader in creating quantum computer algorithms for the financial services industry, has joined [the Village at CA, the start-up accelerator of the Crédit Agricole Group](https://www.credit-agricole.com/en/news-channels/the-channels/topic/2019/villages-by-ca-start-ups-boosting-the-local-and-regional-economy).
The accelerator also offers [QuantFi](https://thequantuminsider.com/2020/04/17/french-startup-applies-quantum-principles-to-service-the-financial-industry/) a global reach, he added.
"The Village at CA offers QuantFi the ability to more easily develop an international presence due to its client network and its campuses in many global cities," said Hiriart.

occurrence_sentence: With a several-decades long background in journalism and communications, Matt Swayne has worked as a science communicator for an R1 university for more than 12 years, specializing in translating high tech and deep tech for the general audience.
